fields.summary: I was charged twice and now I am locked out of my account. Fix this immediately.

description.customer_message: I was charged twice and now I am locked out of my account. Fix this immediately.
description.drafted_response:
I'm so sorry to hear that you've been charged twice and are now locked out of your account - I can imagine how frustrating that must be for you. I want to assure you that we're taking immediate action to resolve this issue. Please allow me to look into this further and I will do my best to provide a solution as soon as possible. I will work to ensure that the duplicate charge is reversed and your account is reinstated promptly. 

The Support Team
